---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, data source, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. For example: I find it frustrating when...

## Describe the solution you would like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you have considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have thought about.

## Data source (if applicable)

If this request involves a new data source, please link it and note whether it is free, keyless, and how it maps to the Business or Company shape.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
